200.reason: [Returning false here causes the lexical analysis loop to terminate immediately. If any valid tokens were processed before this error, they would have already been written to lexer.txt, but for an erroneous program, lexer.txt should remain empty. The lexer should instead buffer all tokens and only write them if no errors are found.]
